name: Pepporoni Pizza Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the bread machine to the 1 1/2 pound setting.
2. Carefully measure and place all ingredients except pepperoni in the bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer's instructions.
3. Add the sliced pepperoni at the raisin/nut signal or 5-10 minutes before the last kneading cycle ends.
4. Select the basic/white cycle. Choose medium or light crust color. Do not use delay cycles.
5. Remove the baked bread from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
Note: This recipe is not recommended for bread machines with cast aluminum pans in horizontal loaf shape because of inconsistent results when tested in our kitchens.
